title: CXXRTL: nmigen GrayDecoder triggers assert when generated from verilog (rtlil works)
body:
## Steps to reproduce the issue
Extract this file:
[gray-cxxrtl-bug.tar.gz](https://github.com/YosysHQ/yosys/files/6675954/gray-cxxrtl-bug.tar.gz)

change into the directory and execute:
`yosys bug.ys`

## Expected behavior
No assert is triggered and the output file is generated.

## Actual behavior

An assert will be triggered and an empty output file is generated:
```
[...]
Module `gray' contains feedback arcs through wires:
  gray.$13
  gray.$7
  gray.$5
  gray.$3
  gray.$1
  gray.$11
  $flatten\gray.$xor$gray.v:47$3_Y
Warning: Design contains feedback wires, which require delta cycles during evaluation.
$flatten\gray.$xor$gray.v:47$3_Y <=================  name of the wire that triggers the assert (debug print added)
ERROR: Assert `is_lhs' failed in backends/cxxrtl/cxxrtl_backend.cc:906.
```
Note: When generating from RTLIL like this:
```
read_rtlil gray.il
write_cxxrtl gray.cc
```
then everything works fine.
code_blocks:
[...]
Module `gray' contains feedback arcs through wires:
  gray.$13
  gray.$7
  gray.$5
  gray.$3
  gray.$1
  gray.$11
  $flatten\gray.$xor$gray.v:47$3_Y
Warning: Design contains feedback wires, which require delta cycles during evaluation.
$flatten\gray.$xor$gray.v:47$3_Y <=================  name of the wire that triggers the assert (debug print added)
ERROR: Assert `is_lhs' failed in backends/cxxrtl/cxxrtl_backend.cc:906.
